testcase.name: testCategoryAndProductRelationship
testcase.system-out:
22:38:46.025 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.techstore.manager.TechStoreMappingTests]: TechStoreMappingTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:38:47.122 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.techstore.manager.TechStoreApplication for test class com.techstore.manager.TechStoreMappingTests
